query:
-- Atualizar eventos do Studio Barra7 na PACSML que estão pending_doctor_price
-- Definir doctor_amount_due = 25.00 e financial_responsible_id = 90001 (PACSML Ltda)
-- e mudar pricing_status para 'ok'
UPDATE billing_visit_events
SET 
  doctor_amount_due = 25.00,
  doctor_price_applied = 25.00,
  financial_responsible_id = 90001,
  pricing_status = 'ok'
WHERE 
  unit_id = 210001 
  AND doctor_user_id = 1 
  AND pricing_status = 'pending_doctor_price';

-- Verificar resultado
SELECT id, report_id, unit_id, doctor_user_id, financial_responsible_id, system_amount_due, doctor_amount_due, pricing_status, signed_at
FROM billing_visit_events
WHERE unit_id = 210001 AND doctor_user_id = 1
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10;
